2603.22002.title: SegMaFormer: A Hybrid State-Space and Transformer Model for Efficient Segmentation
2603.22002.paper_summary: The advent of Transformer and Mamba-based architectures has significantly advanced 3D medical image segmentation by enabling global contextual modeling, a capability traditionally limited in Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). However, state-of-the-art Transformer models often entail substantial computational complexity and parameter counts, which is particularly prohibitive for volumetric data and further exacerbated by the limited availability of annotated medical imaging datasets. To address these limitations, this work introduces SegMaFormer, a lightweight hybrid architecture that synergizes Mamba and Transformer modules within a hierarchical volumetric encoder for efficient long-range dependency modeling. The model strategically employs Mamba-based layers in early, high-resolution stages to reduce computational overhead while capturing essential spatial context, and reserves self-attention mechanisms for later, lower-resolution stages to refine feature representation. This design is augmented with generalized rotary position embeddings to enhance spatial awareness. Despite its compact structure, SegMaFormer achieves competitive performance on three public benchmarks (Synapse, BraTS, and ACDC), matching the Dice coefficient of significantly larger models. Empirically, our approach reduces parameters by up to 75x and substantially decreases FLOPs compared to current state-of-the-art models, establishing an efficient and high-performing solution for 3D medical image segmentation.
2603.22002.paper_summary_zh: Transformer 和 Mamba 基礎架構的出現顯著推進了 3D 醫學影像分割，因為它們能夠實現全球上下文建模，這在傳統的卷積神經網絡 (CNNs) 中是有限的。然而，最先進的 Transformer 模型通常涉及相當大的計算複雜性和參數數量，這對於體積數據特別具有阻礙性，並且受到標註醫學影像數據集有限可用性的進一步加劇。為了解決這些限制，本研究介紹了 SegMaFormer，一種輕量級混合架構，將 Mamba 和 Transformer 模塊協同整合於一個層次化的體積編碼器中，以實現高效的長距依賴建模。該模型在早期的高解析度階段策略性地使用基於 Mamba 的層，以減少計算負擔，同時捕捉重要的空間上下文，並將自注意力機制保留到後期的低解析度階段，以精煉特徵表示。這一設計增強了廣義旋轉位置嵌入，以提升空間感知。儘管其結構緊湊，SegMaFormer 在三個公共基準（Synapse、BraTS 和 ACDC）上達到了具有競爭力的性能，與顯著更大模型的 Dice 係數相匹配。實證結果顯示，我們的方法將參數減少了多達 75 倍，並顯著降低了與當前最先進模型相比的 FLOPs，建立了一個高效且高性能的 3D 醫學影像分割解決方案。
2603.22002.author: Duy D. Nguyen et.al.
2603.22002.authors: Duy D. Nguyen, Phat T. Tran-Truong
